jd_text: Director of Engineering Location: Saudi Arabia (Relocation support to be discussed) Package: Highly competitive, tax-free executive package Sector: Aerial Work Platforms (AWP) & Powered Access Rental Overview Our client is a market-leading organisation within the powered access and equipment rental sector, with a strong and growing footprint across the GCC. As part of their continued expansion, they are seeking an experienced Director of Engineering to lead and transform their fleet engineering function across the region. This is a high-impact leadership role offering the opportunity to shape engineering strategy, drive operational excellence, and play a key role in supporting significant regional growth. The Opportunity Based in Saudi Arabia, you will take full ownership of the company’s engineering and fleet strategy across multiple GCC markets. You will be responsible for optimising asset performance, leading large-scale investment programmes, and ensuring best-in-class maintenance and reliability standards across a diverse fleet. This role offers significant executive exposure, long-term career progression, and the chance to contribute to major infrastructure and development projects across the Middle East. Key Responsibilities Strategic & Financial Leadership Define and deliver the regional engineering strategy aligned with business growth objectives Lead CAPEX planning, fleet investment, and lifecycle optimisation programmes Provide strategic guidance to senior leadership on fleet performance, renewal, and cost efficiency Drive data-led decision making through KPI monitoring, utilisation analysis, and cost control Fleet & Asset Management Oversee fleet operations across multiple GCC locations, ensuring consistency and best practice Manage full asset lifecycle from specification and procurement through to disposal Implement predictive and preventative maintenance strategies to maximise uptime Leverage telematics and digital systems to enhance visibility and performance Maintenance & Reliability Lead all maintenance, inspection, and compliance programmes across the fleet Drive reliability-centred maintenance and continuous improvement initiatives Optimise parts supply chains, vendor relationships, and maintenance contracts Support sustainability initiatives including emissions reduction and energy-efficient technologies Leadership & Organisational Development Lead and develop a high-performing, multi-national engineering team Foster a culture of safety, accountability, and continuous improvement Partner with Operations and HR on workforce planning and capability development Budget & Performance Management Manage engineering budgets and capital investment across the region Identify cost efficiencies through innovation, procurement, and process optimisation Report on operational and financial performance to executive leadership Safety, Quality & Compliance Champion a safety-first culture across all engineering activities Ensure full compliance with regional HSE and regulatory standards Lead audits, investigations, and continuous improvement programmes Candidate Profile Minimum 8 years’ leadership experience within fleet, plant, or equipment engineering (powered access experience essential) Strong technical expertise across mechanical, hydraulic, and electrical systems Proven track record managing large-scale CAPEX programmes and engineering budgets Experience with telematics, digital fleet management, and asset optimisation tools Prior experience in the GCC or emerging markets is advantageous but not essential
